channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GEECEE] GeeCee Ventures Completes Conversion of Partly Paid-Up Equity Shares in Bharti Airtel
item.description:
GeeCee Ventures Ltd has completed the conversion of its partly paid-up equity shares in Bharti Airtel Limited (BAL) into fully paid-up equity shares. The Company held 2,30,976 partly paid-up equity shares of BAL, for which it remitted a payment of Rs. 9,26,79,120 towards the First and Final Call notice. Following approval from BAL's Special Committee of Directors, the conversion was effected, resulting in the Company holding 2,30,976 fully paid-up equity shares of BAL. This conversion has led to the Company's investment in BAL exceeding the threshold specified in Regulation 30(4)(i)(c) of SEBI (LODR) Reg. 2015.

  • GeeCee Ventures has completed the conversion of its 2,30,976 partly paid-up equity shares in Bharti Airtel Limited into fully paid-up equity shares.
  • The Company remitted a payment of Rs. 9,26,79,120 towards the First and Final Call notice for the shares.
  • The conversion resulted in the Company holding 2,30,976 fully paid-up equity shares of Bharti Airtel Limited.
  • This conversion has led to the Company's investment in Bharti Airtel Limited exceeding the threshold specified in Regulation 30(4)(i)(c) of SEBI (LODR) Reg. 2015.
  • Bharti Airtel Limited is a leading global telecommunications company with operations in South Asia and Africa.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GeeCee Ventures Limited | Category: Investment

item.title: [JPASSOCIAT] Jaiprakash Associates Ltd Approves Adani Enterprises' Resolution Plan; Net-worth to Improve Post-CIRP
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Jaiprakash Associates Ltd (JAL) has approved the resolution plan submitted by Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) on March 17, 2026. The National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) has also approved the plan. Post-implementation of the plan, all assets of JAL will be free from encumbrances. The company's net-worth is currently negative, but it is expected to improve post-CIRP. JAL will continue as a going concern, with no additional material liabilities imposed, other than the commitment of the Successful Resolution Applicant to infuse up to INR 800 crores towards working capital and operational improvements.

  • Jaiprakash Associates Ltd has approved Adani Enterprises' resolution plan.
  • The NCLT has also approved the plan.
  • All assets of JAL will be free from encumbrances post-CIRP.
  • JAL's net-worth is expected to improve post-CIRP.
  • JAL will continue as a going concern with no additional material liabilities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAIPRAKASH ASSOCIATES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HCLTECH] HCL Technologies Ltd: USD 500 Million Notes Fully Repaid
item.description:
HCL Technologies Ltd. announces the full repayment of 1.375% senior unsecured notes worth USD 500 million issued by its step-down subsidiary, HCL America Inc. The notes, issued in March 2021, had a principal amount of USD 247.793 million bought back and cancelled in February 2023. The remaining balance of USD 252.207 million was fully repaid by HCL America Inc. on March 10, 2026. As no notes remain outstanding, the guarantee provided by HCL Technologies Ltd. for these notes will be released by the Trustee.

  • HCL Technologies Ltd.'s step-down subsidiary, HCL America Inc., issued 1.375% senior unsecured notes worth USD 500 million in March 2021.
  • USD 247.793 million worth of notes were bought back and cancelled in February 2023.
  • The remaining balance of USD 252.207 million was fully repaid by HCL America Inc. on March 10, 2026.
  • HCL Technologies Ltd. provided an unconditional and irrevocable guarantee for these notes.
  • As no notes remain outstanding, HCL Technologies Ltd.'s guarantee for these notes will be released by the Trustee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HCL TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Buyback

item.title: [ANGELONE] Angel One Ltd Settles Violation of SEBI Circular on Association with Certain Algo Platforms
item.description:
Angel One Limited (AOL) has settled a violation of the SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/MIRSD/DOP/P/CIR/2022/117 dated September 02, 2022 and Clause A (2) & A (5) of Schedule II for Code of Conduct read with Regulation 9 of SEBI (Stock Brokers) Regulations, 1992. The violation was in relation to AOL's association with certain algo platforms offering guaranteed returns or consistent profit. SEBI conducted an examination and found that the Application Programming Interface of 122 stock brokers, including AOL, remained integrated with these algo platforms. SEBI initiated adjudication proceedings against these stock brokers, but with the objective of reducing the regulatory burden, SEBI decided to introduce a Settlement Scheme. AOL made an application to avail the benefit of the scheme and remitted the specified amount of Rs.1,00,000/-. There is no material impact on financial, no impact on operations or other activities of AOL due to the order.

  • Angel One Limited has settled a violation of SEBI Circular SEBI/HO/MIRSD/DOP/P/CIR/2022/117 dated September 02, 2022
  • The violation was in relation to AOL's association with certain algo platforms offering guaranteed returns or consistent profit
  • SEBI conducted an examination and found that the Application Programming Interface of 122 stock brokers, including AOL, remained integrated with these algo platforms
  • AOL made an application to avail the benefit of the scheme and remitted the specified amount of Rs.1,00,000/-
  • There is no material impact on financial, no impact on operations or other activities of AOL due to the order

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Angel One Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [WINROC] Winro Commercial India Converts Partly Paid-Up Equity Shares of Bharti Airtel Worth Rs. 42.98 Crores into Fully Paid-Up Shares
item.description:
Winro Commercial India Ltd. has converted its partly paid-up equity shares of Bharti Airtel Limited into fully paid-up equity shares, following the payment of the first and final call of Rs. 401.25 per share, amounting to Rs. 42,98,01,746.25. This conversion will result in the company holding an aggregate of 1,071,425 fully paid-up equity shares of Bharti Airtel Limited. The acquisition is a financial investment made in the ordinary course of business and does not require any governmental or regulatory approvals.

  • Winro Commercial India has converted its partly paid-up equity shares of Bharti Airtel Limited into fully paid-up equity shares.
  • The conversion follows the payment of the first and final call of Rs. 401.25 per share, amounting to Rs. 42,98,01,746.25.
  • Upon conversion, the company will hold an aggregate of 1,071,425 fully paid-up equity shares of Bharti Airtel Limited.
  • The acquisition is a financial investment made in the ordinary course of business.
  • No governmental or regulatory approvals are required for the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: WINRO COMMERCIAL (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [ADANIENT] Adani Enterprises Acquires Jaiprakash Associates in Major Insolvency Resolution
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Enterprises Limited (AEL) has successfully acquired Jaiprakash Associates Limited (JAL) through an approved resolution plan dated October 14, 2025, under the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The Committee of Creditors approved the resolution plan with a voting share of 93.81% on November 18, 2025. The acquisition may be implemented by AEL or its promoters, promoter group, Adani Entities, or any special purpose vehicle or any other entity and/or nominee. The CIRP of JAL was initiated on June 3, 2024, and Mr. Bhuvan Madan was appointed as the Resolution Professional. The approved resolution plan was placed on the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) website on March 18, 2026.

  • Adani Enterprises Limited acquires Jaiprakash Associates Limited through an approved resolution plan.
  • The acquisition is under the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
  • The Committee of Creditors approved the resolution plan with a voting share of 93.81%.
  • The acquisition may be implemented by AEL or its promoters, promoter group, Adani Entities, or any special purpose vehicle or any other entity and/or nominee.
  • The CIRP of JAL was initiated on June 3, 2024, and Mr. Bhuvan Madan was appointed as the Resolution Professional.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ADANIPOWER] Adani Power Expresses Interest in Jaiprakash Associates' Assets Under Resolution Plan
item.description:
Adani Power Limited has expressed its in-principle interest in becoming one of the Implementing Entities under the approved resolution plan of Jaiprakash Associates Limited. This plan, submitted by Adani Enterprises Limited, allows for the acquisition of assets from JAL by nominated Implementing Entities. The interest is subject to necessary approvals and is in relation to certain power assets and investments from JAL.

  • Adani Power Limited expresses interest in Jaiprakash Associates Limited's assets
  • Interest is subject to approval under the Resolution Plan of Jaiprakash Associates Limited
  • Adani Enterprises Limited's Resolution Plan approved by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal
  • Plan allows for acquisition of assets from JAL by Implementing Entities
  • Interest is in relation to certain power assets and investments from JAL

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI POWER LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [IREDA] IREDA to Consider Interim Dividend Declaration for FY 2025-26; Trading Window Closed
item.description:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd (IREDA) has announced that a Board of Directors meeting will be held on March 25, 2026, to consider the proposal for declaring an interim dividend for the financial year 2025-26. In accordance with SEBI regulations and the company's policy, the trading window for dealings in the company's securities will remain closed till 48 hours after the conclusion of the board meeting. All designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in IREDA's equity shares and listed debt securities during this period.

  • IREDA to consider interim dividend declaration for FY 2025-26
  • Board of Directors meeting scheduled for March 25, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed till 48 hours after the board meeting
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in IREDA's securities during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [WELCORP] Welspun Corp Ltd Acquires 45% Stake in Welspun Corporate Services Limited for Rs. 45,000
item.description:
Welspun Corp Ltd has approved the acquisition of 4,500 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each of Welspun Corporate Services Limited (formerly known as Welspun Home Textiles Limited) representing 45% of the total paid-up equity share capital of WCSL at a consideration of Rs. 45,000/-. This acquisition is intended to support the establishment and strengthening of WCSL as a centralized umbrella entity for delivering corporate services across Welspun Group. WCSL will become an associate company of the Company and will provide integrated management and support services including human resources, legal, regulatory and compliance, taxation, corporate restructuring, mergers and amalgamations, strategic advisory, and other corporate services. The proposed acquisition is expected to be completed by 31 March, 2026.

  • Welspun Corp Ltd to acquire 45% stake in Welspun Corporate Services Limited for Rs. 45,000
  • WCSL to act as a centralized corporate services platform for Welspun Group entities
  • Acquisition intended to support the establishment and strengthening of WCSL as a centralized umbrella entity
  • WCSL will provide integrated management and support services
  • Expected completion date of the acquisition is 31 March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Welspun Corp Limited | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [IREDA] IREDA Board to Consider Interim Dividend Declaration for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd (IREDA) has informed the BSE that a Board of Directors meeting is scheduled for March 25, 2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of a proposal for the declaration of an Interim Dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for dealings in the company's securities will remain closed 48 hours after the board meeting. Designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in IREDA's equity shares and listed debt securities during this period.

  • IREDA Board Meeting scheduled for March 25, 2026
  • Consideration of Interim Dividend Declaration for FY 2025-26
  • Trading Window to remain closed 48 hours after the board meeting
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in IREDA's securities during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Ltd | Category: Dividend
